def negative_fastapi_sync_def_with_blocking_io():
    rule_id = "fastapi_sync_def_with_blocking_io"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "FastAPI sync route handlers perform blocking I/O instead of using async routes or executor offload."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
